series_metadata.series_description: Project files contain original proposals, original agreements, original quarterly reports and correspondence (i.e. scope changes, additional time or money) and information relating to the general conduct of the project.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records are kept in active area one year final report is received. a years records are retained as completed projects in office filing cabinets another two years. ; Electronic: two years completed files are scanned and paper copies are destroyed. Scanned images are kept another seven years a total of
